focal_character.name: Yejide Adeyemi
focal_character.occupation: fabric quality inspector at a garment factory
focal_character.ordinary_life_state: Yejide works the final-inspection line at a Lagos garment factory and is training a new checker; when a missing dye lot stalls production, she locates the absent undyed base cotton by looking at the empty hook rather than the delivered rolls.

problem_structure.unknown: the missing bolt of undyed base cotton that should occupy the empty space in the fabric inventory
data: hundreds of fabric rolls wrapped in clear plastic and labeled with dye lots and batch numbers
Lot 39-A, the roll that sits askew and remains untouched by every wrong approach
an empty compartment beneath the materialised shelf where a roll should be
a sliding panel holding a single unlabeled bolt of raw cotton
problem_structure.condition: closure responds to the absence being noticed and named, not to the present rolls being arranged or catalogued

gate_details.correct_approach: Yejide stops at the threshold, sits down outside the gate, lets her gaze move to the empty compartment, asks what is missing, and reaches toward the absence; the gate responds by opening a panel that reveals the raw-cotton bolt, and the gate closes when she pulls it out.

new_texture: A Lagos garment-factory inspection floor smells of starch and machine oil and is lit by fluorescent lights above racks of fabric.
A production board shows a gap between midnight and steel shades where Lot 41-C should slot in, while checkers argue about mislabeling and customs delays.
A foreman checks a tablet and pales when asked whether the base cotton for the missing lot actually arrived.

anchor_update.observation: Grade 2. Executor approach — room emphasised the visible pattern; one element outside it did not recede. System builder — room mirrored categorical order, perfectly arranged, gate elsewhere. Information gatherer — room gave complete inventory, no question asked. Correct solver: stood at threshold, gaze moved to empty space; Register 2 at sitting; Register 3 at naming absence; gate closed.
anchor_update.reader_can_suspect_update: The anchor now logs register transitions with second-level precision, explicitly notes when solvers fail to ask any question of the data, and tracks whether solvers orient toward the category of answer rather than its content.

macro_mystery_update.evidence: A notebook page left on a Lagos factory windowsill uses the same concise notation as observations in Accra, Nairobi, and Dakar, recording all three wrong approaches and the precise register transitions of the solver who named the absence.
